_comment: Commercial domain seed — 10 journeys, 12 personas, 40 activities based on Confluence PC space (PO – Retail Commercials, SRD & Inventory). Persona nodes include lifecycle_stage for persona lifecycle management.
_source: Confluence PC space persona index (Section 11) + Journey Index and Cross-Reference Matrix (12.0)

nodes.label: Domain
nodes.name: Commercial
nodes.description: Retail Commercials domain: pricing, promotions, assortment, vendor management, and invoice matching.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Product Creation and Item Setup
nodes.description: End-to-end item master data creation and setup for buying.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Buying Cycle
nodes.description: Sourcing, negotiation, purchase order generation, and confirmation.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Price Setting and Maintenance
nodes.description: Regular pricing, price changes, zone-level price maintenance.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Promotion Lifecycle
nodes.description: Promotion creation, offer components, VFP/VFM, execution and monitoring.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Assortment and Range Planning
nodes.description: Range planning, item-location ranging, planogram validation.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Supplier Onboarding and Management
nodes.description: Supplier onboarding, contract negotiation, performance review.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Purchase Order to Invoice Match
nodes.description: PO-to-invoice matching, tolerance rules, settlements.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Markdown and Clearance
nodes.description: Clearance scheduling, markdown cadence, margin protection.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: Consignment and Extended Valuation
nodes.description: Consignment stock tracking, settlement, inventory accounting.

nodes.label: UserJourney
nodes.name: New Product Introduction
nodes.description: Market analysis, sourcing, price/promo planning, range allocation, launch.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Define Item Specification
nodes.description: Master Data Analyst defines the core item spec and attributes.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Create Merchandise Hierarchy Placement
nodes.description: Place the item in the correct merchandise hierarchy nodes.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Enrich Master Data Attributes
nodes.description: Enrich item with size, colour, supplier, cost, and duty details.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Approve Item for Buying
nodes.description: Category Manager approves the item for entry into the buying cycle.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Identify Sourcing Need
nodes.description: Buyer identifies a category gap and initiates sourcing.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Negotiate Supplier Terms
nodes.description: Buyer and Vendor Manager negotiate price, MOQ, and lead time.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Generate Purchase Order
nodes.description: Buyer raises the PO in the merchandising system.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Confirm Order Acceptance
nodes.description: Vendor confirms the PO and commits to delivery schedule.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Review Cost Changes
nodes.description: Pricing Analyst reviews landed cost changes from the vendor.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Compute Price Elasticity
nodes.description: Analyse demand elasticity to inform zone price recommendations.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Set Zone-Level Prices
nodes.description: Apply recommended prices per zone in Oracle RPM.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Publish to RPM
nodes.description: Publish approved prices to Retail Price Management and downstream systems.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Plan Promotional Calendar
nodes.description: Promo Planner builds the promotional calendar for the season.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Build Offer Components
nodes.description: Configure offer mechanics, thresholds, and reward types.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Validate Margin Impact
nodes.description: Validate that the promotion preserves minimum category margin.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Execute and Monitor Sell-Through
nodes.description: Launch the promotion and monitor daily sell-through and stock cover.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Review Category Performance
nodes.description: Category Manager reviews sales, margin, and stock KPIs by category.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Define Range Strategy
nodes.description: Define width, depth, and price-architecture strategy for the range.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Allocate Items to Formats
nodes.description: Range Planner assigns items to store formats and clusters.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Validate Planogram Fit
nodes.description: Confirm planogram capacity and fixture compatibility for new items.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Perform Vendor Due Diligence
nodes.description: Vendor Manager assesses financial health and compliance of new suppliers.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Negotiate Contract Terms
nodes.description: Agree payment terms, rebates, exclusivity, and SLA clauses.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Set Up Vendor Master Data
nodes.description: Create vendor record, bank details, and tax information in RMS.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Conduct Performance Review
nodes.description: Quarterly vendor scorecard review with on-time delivery and quality metrics.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Receive Goods at DC
nodes.description: Inbound team books delivery window and accepts vendor shipment.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Perform Three-Way Match
nodes.description: Match PO, goods receipt, and vendor invoice in ReIM.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Resolve Discrepancies
nodes.description: Investigate and resolve quantity or price mismatches.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Approve for Payment
nodes.description: AP Analyst approves the matched invoice for settlement.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Identify Slow-Mover Candidates
nodes.description: Pricing Analyst runs the slow-mover report and identifies clearance candidates.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Configure Clearance Rules
nodes.description: Build markdown rules with depth, cadence, and exit price.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Approve Markdown Cadence
nodes.description: Pricing Analyst and Director approve the markdown schedule.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Publish to POS and Monitor
nodes.description: Push clearance prices to POS and track sell-through vs. target.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Track Consignment Stock Levels
nodes.description: Inventory Analyst monitors consignment stock on hand at store and DC.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Calculate Settlement Amount
nodes.description: Compute the consignment sales value and settlement due to vendor.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Reconcile Valuation
nodes.description: Finance Liaison reconciles consignment valuation with general ledger.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Invoice Supplier
nodes.description: Vendor Manager issues the consignment settlement invoice.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Analyze Market Opportunity
nodes.description: Category Manager assesses market gap and consumer demand for new product.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Source and Negotiate
nodes.description: Buyer sources the product and negotiates commercial terms with vendor.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Plan Price and Promotion
nodes.description: Pricing Analyst and Promo Planner set launch price and introductory offer.

nodes.label: Activity
nodes.name: Allocate to Range and Launch
nodes.description: Range Planner allocates the new item to stores and confirms launch readiness.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Category Manager
nodes.description: Owns category strategy and P&L; accountable for assortment and pricing decisions.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Merchandise Buyer
nodes.description: Executes procurement and vendor negotiation for assigned categories.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Range Planner
nodes.description: Manages assortment allocation to store formats and planogram compliance.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Commercial Director
nodes.description: Strategic oversight and approval authority for commercial domain decisions.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Pricing Analyst
nodes.description: Day-to-day pricing operations, elasticity analysis, and markdown planning.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Promo Planner
nodes.description: Promotion planning and execution across channels and store formats.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Master Data Analyst
nodes.description: Item master data management, hierarchy maintenance, and data governance.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Inventory Analyst
nodes.description: Stock position management, consignment tracking, and clearance planning.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Store Ops
nodes.description: Store-level execution of pricing, promotions, and stock processes.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Vendor Manager
nodes.description: Supplier relationship management, onboarding, and contract administration.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: Finance Liaison
nodes.description: Cross-domain finance coordination, reconciliation, and settlement support.

nodes.label: Role
nodes.name: AP Analyst
nodes.description: Accounts payable processing, three-way matching, and payment approvals.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: Oracle RPM
nodes.description: Oracle Retail Price Management — regular pricing and price changes.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: Oracle RMS
nodes.description: Oracle Retail Merchandising System — assortment, item master, and buying.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: ReIM
nodes.description: Retail Invoice Matching — PO-to-invoice matching and settlements.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: AutoCN
nodes.description: Auto-consignment — consignment stock tracking and settlement.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: SSPOG
nodes.description: Space Planning / Planogram — assortment layout and fixture planning.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: Supplier Portal
nodes.description: Vendor self-service portal for POs, invoices, and compliance.

nodes.label: System
nodes.name: EDI Gateway
nodes.description: Electronic data interchange for PO and invoice exchange with vendors.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.name: Commercial HQ
nodes.description: Corporate headquarters for commercial planning and pricing.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.name: Buying Office
nodes.description: Buying team office for vendor meetings and negotiation.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.name: Store A
nodes.description: Flagship downtown store.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.name: Store B
nodes.description: Suburban store.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.name: Central DC
nodes.description: Primary distribution centre for inbound and outbound logistics.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Category Manager
nodes.description: Category ownership and strategy across assortment, pricing, and promotions.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Merchandise Buyer
nodes.description: Buying and negotiation for category assortments and vendor relationships.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Range Planner
nodes.description: Assortment and range planning, format allocation, and planogram validation.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Commercial Director
nodes.description: Strategic oversight and approval authority for the commercial domain.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Pricing Analyst
nodes.description: Price setting, maintenance, elasticity analysis, and markdown planning.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Promo Planner
nodes.description: Promotion planning and execution across channels and formats.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Master Data Analyst
nodes.description: Item master data management, hierarchy maintenance, and data governance.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Inventory Analyst
nodes.description: Inventory position management, consignment tracking, and clearance planning.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Store Ops
nodes.description: Store operations execution of pricing, promotions, and stock processes.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Vendor Manager
nodes.description: Supplier relationship management, onboarding, and contract administration.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: Finance Liaison
nodes.description: Finance cross-domain coordination, reconciliation, and settlement support.

nodes.label: Persona
nodes.name: AP Analyst
nodes.description: Accounts payable processing, three-way matching, and payment approvals.

nodes.label: KPI
nodes.name: Gross Margin
nodes.description: Category gross margin percentage after promotions and markdowns.

nodes.label: KPI
nodes.name: Stock Turn Rate
nodes.description: Inventory turns per year by category.

nodes.label: KPI
nodes.name: Supplier On-Time Delivery
nodes.description: Percentage of PO lines delivered within promised lead time.

nodes.label: KPI
nodes.name: Average Time to Market
nodes.description: Days from sourcing need to first customer sale.

nodes.label: KPI
nodes.name: Promotion ROI
nodes.description: Return on investment for promotional campaigns.

nodes.label: OKRDirective
nodes.name: Q2 2026 Commercial OKRs
nodes.description: Q2 2026 OKR cycle for Commercial domain focusing on margin improvement and supply chain efficiency.

nodes.label: Objective
nodes.name: Improve Gross Margin Through Better Pricing and Promotion
nodes.description: Drive margin improvement by optimizing pricing decisions and promotional effectiveness.

nodes.label: Objective
nodes.name: Accelerate Time to Market for New Products
nodes.description: Reduce end-to-end cycle time from sourcing to first customer sale.

nodes.label: Objective
nodes.name: Strengthen Supplier Reliability and Inventory Efficiency
nodes.description: Improve supplier on-time delivery and optimize inventory turnover.

nodes.label: KeyResult
nodes.name: Increase Gross Margin from 38% to 42%
nodes.description: Achieve 4 percentage point margin improvement through better pricing and promotion optimization.

nodes.label: KeyResult
nodes.name: Increase Promotion ROI from 2.8 to 3.5
nodes.description: Improve promotional campaign effectiveness through better targeting and execution.

nodes.label: KeyResult
nodes.name: Reduce Time to Market from 105 to 90 days
nodes.description: Accelerate product development and launch cycle time.

nodes.label: KeyResult
nodes.name: Increase Stock Turn Rate from 6.5 to 8 turns
nodes.description: Improve inventory velocity through better assortment and clearance management.

nodes.label: KeyResult
nodes.name: Increase Supplier On-Time Delivery from 90% to 95%
nodes.description: Improve supplier reliability through better vendor management and demand forecasting.
